message:
chore(beads): Add comprehensive test coverage epic with 56 beads

Epic bd-17x: Comprehensive Test Coverage (No Mocks, Full E2E)

Structure:
- 1 epic (bd-17x)
- 2 infrastructure beads (harness bd-n3q, logging bd-2cp)
- 1 fixture generator (bd-14s)
- 1 refactoring task (bd-14f)
- 11 unit test beads (client, protocol, macros, cli, server modules)
- 7 E2E test beads (protocol, workflow, auth, cli, transport, middleware, stress)
- 33 subtasks for granular tracking

Key features:
- Proper dependency chain: harness -> logging -> E2E tests
- Unit tests required before corresponding E2E tests
- Detailed acceptance criteria on key beads
- Implementation notes with file locations and APIs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
